T0009.title: Fixed Payout
T0009.definition: Fixed payout, referring to the predetermined amount a task participant (bonus abuser) receives upon completing an assignment in fraud or grey-market operations. This term commonly appears in task groups involving proxy purchasing or compensation claims, where the payout is explicitly stated in the task listing.
T0009.description: Fixed payout, referring to the predetermined amount a task participant (bonus abuser) receives upon completing an assignment in fraud or grey-market operations. This term commonly appears in task groups involving proxy purchasing or compensation claims, where the payout is explicitly stated in the task listing.
T0009.usageExample: XXX Ginger Shampoo & Conditioner for strengthening roots and oil control, silicone-free, 4/CZ0001 xK2ZWxxxx/:// XXX Both can be selected in quantity 2, with a 25-yuan coupon. Pay 195, rebate 9.35%, cost 176.7, fixed payout 184. Kunshan, Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, XXX + XXX Name: Code XXX, use your own phone number. Note: 'XXX' indicates redacted content. In this case, 'cost' refers to the minimum upfront payment the proxy buyer must cover, and 'fixed payout' refers to the fixed return amount.
